raw_consumer_statement:

American Express would never let me show my proof yet I did speak with a representative of American Express telling them that I had proof. American Express only took XXXX 's letters that did not include my email correspondents from XXXX showing I cancelled on within the Free trial time. There have been numerous complaints about XXXX - '' Grossly deceptive advertising '' ; False advertising '' and for Buyers to beware of them ''. 
American Express has been complicit with the possible illegal activities of XXXX. 
I will need more time to upload the needed documents. Please respond in such a way that I can send documentation.
